name: Avalon: Unexpected Patient
description:
You’ve crashed down to the planet of Avalon, and clearly the crash hasn’t did you any good. You’re injured, quite badly. Seems like you’ve meet your fate on the icy moon… Unless?

Yet another Avali, can’t get enough of these little birbs

(Artist is Rayethelitwick!)
creator: HunterKillerDrone25
